titleStmt.title: SII 23.346: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 346. (A.R. No. 346 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the west wall of the same maṇḍapa Rājēndra-Chōḷa I: year 9: 1021-22 A.D.

summary.p: This begins with the introduction Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara etc. This registers a gift of 25 kāśu for the purchase of a land, to burn a perpetual lamp in front of the image of Aṇḍanāyaka with his consort Umā, by Kiḻavaṉ Vijayam the wife of Aḍumbūruḍaiyāṉ Kīrttikaṇṭaṉ. The image is said to have been consecrated by Śembināḍu Kiḻavaṉ Saduraṉ alias Vāṉavaṉ-Mūvēndavēḷār of Śembil-nāḍu in Rājarāja-maṇḍalam, the brother of this lady.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉi vaḷara Irunilamaṭantaiyum poṟceyap pā vaiyuñ cirttaṉic celviyu
n=taṉ perun=teviyarāki yiṉpuṟa neṭutuya lūḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟaināṭun tuṭarvaṉa velippaṭar vaṉavāciyu
ñ cuḷḷi cūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyu naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ maṇṇaik kaṭakkamum porukaṭaliḻattarai
yaratamuṭiyu viyar Oṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavarpakkal teṉṉavar vaiytta cun=taramuṭi
yum In=tiraṉāramum Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaik keraḷaṉ muṟai maiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kulataṉa
mākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velait tol peruṅkāvil pala paḻan=tivum ceru
viṟ ciṉavil Irupattorukā laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ
mevaruñ cāntimat tivaraṇ karuti Iruttiya cempoṟṟi ruttaku muṭiyum payaṅkoḷ muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭṭoḷitta caraciṅkaṉ A
ḷapperum pukaḻoṭu piṭi Iraṭṭapāṭi Eḻaraiilakkamum maṉṉetik kulap perumalaikaḷum māpporu taṇṭāṟ koṇṭa
kopparakesaripanmarāṉa śrīrājendraco[ ḻadeva] rkku yāṇṭu 6Āvatu vaṭakarai rājendrasiṅhavaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭu
devadāṉa brahmadeyam vempaṟṟūrākiya coḻamāttāṇṭa ccaturvedi maṅkalamuṭaiya tiruvicalūr māhādevar ko
yilil rājarājamaṇṭalattu cempilnāṭṭuc cempināṭu kiḻavaṉ caturaṉāṉa vāṉavaṉ muven=taveḷār Ikkoyili
l Eḻun=taruvitta Umāsahitat tirumeṉi jhaṇḍanāyakarkku vāṉavaṉ muven=taveḷār Uṭaṉpiṟanta cempināṭukiḻavaṉ kiḻavaṉ maka
ḷ Aṭumpūruṭaiyāṉ kiktikaṇṭaṉ Akamuṭaiyāḷ kiḻavaṉ vicaiyam Aṇṭanāyakarkku tirunondāviḷakku candrādittavaṟ Oṉṟerip
pataṟku ṉilaṅ koḷḷak kuṭutta kācu 2 10 5 Ikkācu Irupattaintum kuṭuttuk koṇṭa pūmikoṇṭu Avvav Āṇṭukaḷ śrī
kāryañ ceyvārkaḷe Ittiruṉondā viḷakku Erippikka kaṭavārkaḷāka vum Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 23.346 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
